title: add mannequin figure type with walk animation and joint dragging
description:
## Summary
- Implemented wooden artist mannequin as a new figure type in Brett.
- Full bone hierarchy with 17 segments and 12 brass joints.
- Realistic walk animation (toggled via UI).
- Joint dragging: click and drag brass joints to pose the figure.
- Art-Library integration with 3D category and canvas thumbnail.
- WebSocket synchronization for walk state.

## Test plan
- [x] task test:all
- [x] manifest syntax verified via test:manifests
- [x] WebSocket sync state verified via figToJSON updates

Closes T000369

Co-Authored-By: Gemini CLI 1.5 Pro
